version: 1
name: png-cleanup
trigger:
  type: folder_watch
  path: ~/in
  glob: "*.png"
  settle_seconds: 2
dedup: content_hash
engine: headless
steps:
  - image.validate
  - image.white_to_alpha: { fuzz: 8 }
  - image.trim: {}
  - image.export: { dest: ~/out, format: png }
on_failure: { retries: 1, then: mark_failed }
